key.name: max-history
key.summary: Maximum number of clipboard history items to keep
key.description: All stored items are searchable (text only) and reachable via scroll. Higher values use more disk space (~30KB per image, ~1KB per text item).

key.name: max-text-mb
key.description: Text payloads larger than this are not stored.

key.name: max-image-mb
key.description: Image payloads larger than this are not stored.

key.name: page-size
key.summary: Number of items to fetch per history page
key.description: The panel loads this many rows on open and again each time the scroll reaches the bottom.

key.name: keyboard-shortcut
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to open the clipboard panel

key.name: panel-width
key.summary: Width of the clipboard panel in pixels

key.name: panel-max-height
key.summary: Maximum height of the clipboard panel in pixels

key.name: move-activated-to-top
key.summary: Move the selected item to the top of the list when activated
key.description: When enabled, clicking or pressing Enter on a history item moves it to position 1 in the list.

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Position of the clipboard panel on screen

key.name: excluded-apps
key.summary: App WM class substrings to exclude from clipboard history
key.description: Items copied while one of these apps has keyboard focus will not be stored in history. The match is case-insensitive and uses substring matching.
